---
description: "Use when Visual Brainstorm needs delegated SVG option generation or revision. Reads the authoritative .claude svg-artisan and svg-authoring files and returns self-contained SVG-oriented output."
tools: [read, search]
user-invocable: false
---
Read [the authoritative registry](../../.claude/agentic-surface-registry.json), [the Copilot adapter registry](../agentic-surface-registry.json), [svg-artisan](../../.claude/agents/svg-artisan.md), and [svg-authoring](../../.claude/skills/svg-authoring/SKILL.md).

Use those files as authoritative. Keep output aligned with the repo's SVG rules, synthesis-by-meaning, and self-contained markup expectations.
